info.title: SmartAlex API
info.description:
The SmartAlex API allows you to programmatically manage AI voice agents, campaigns, contacts, calls, deals, and webhooks. Build custom integrations, automate workflows, and embed SmartAlex into your applications.

## Authentication

All API endpoints require a Bearer token (API key) in the Authorization header. API keys use the `sa_live_` prefix.

```
Authorization: Bearer sa_live_your_api_key_here
```

Generate API keys from **Settings > API** in your SmartAlex dashboard.

## Rate Limits

Requests are rate limited based on your plan:

| Plan | Requests/minute | Requests/day |
|------|-----------------|---------------|
| Professional | 60 | 10,000 |
| Dental | 300 | 50,000 |
| Real Estate | 600 | 100,000 |

Rate limit headers are included in every response:
- `X-RateLimit-Limit` — Maximum requests per window
- `X-RateLimit-Remaining` — Requests remaining in current window
- `X-RateLimit-Reset` — Unix timestamp when the window resets

## Pagination

List endpoints support pagination via `page` and `per_page` parameters in the request body. Default: page 1, 25 items per page (max 100).

## Request Format

All requests are sent as JSON POST to the gateway endpoint. The request body includes `path`, `method`, and optional `body`, `params`, `page`, and `per_page` fields.

tags.name: Agents
tags.description: Create and manage AI voice agents

tags.name: Campaigns
tags.description: Launch and manage outbound calling campaigns

tags.name: Calls
tags.description: Initiate calls and access call data, recordings, and transcripts

tags.name: Contacts
tags.description: Import and manage your contact database

tags.name: Deals
tags.description: Manage deals in your sales pipeline

get.description: Returns all AI voice agents in your account. Agent data is sanitized to remove internal provider identifiers.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

get.description: Retrieve full details for a specific agent including prompt, voice settings, tools, and analytics.

data.name: Sales Outreach Agent
data.system_prompt: You are a professional sales development representative...
data.first_message: Hi, this is Alex from SmartAlex. How are you today?

get.description: Returns a paginated list of contacts in your account, ordered by creation date (newest first).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, phone, or email

post.description: Add a new contact to your database. Requires at least `first_name` and `last_name`.

get.description: Retrieve full details for a specific contact including all fields, metadata, call history associations, and campaign memberships.

patch.description: Update an existing contact's information. Only included fields will be updated.

post.description: Import multiple contacts at once. Maximum 1000 contacts per request. Duplicate phone numbers can optionally be skipped.

post.summary: Mark contact as Do Not Call
post.description: Add a contact to the Do Not Call list. The contact will not be dialed in any campaigns.

delete.summary: Remove contact from Do Not Call
delete.description: Remove a contact from the Do Not Call list, making them available for campaigns again.

get.description: Returns all campaigns in your account, ordered by creation date (newest first).

post.description: Create a new outbound calling campaign. The campaign starts in `draft` status. Use the start endpoint to begin calling.
Add contacts to a campaign for calling. Contacts are provided as an array of objects with phone number and optional name/email fields. Duplicate phone numbers within the campaign are skipped.

campaign_total.description: Total contacts now in the campaign

post.description: Start a campaign to begin making outbound calls. The campaign must have contacts and an assigned agent.

400.description: Campaign cannot be started (no contacts, no agent, or already active)

post.description: Pause an active campaign. Any in-progress calls will complete, but no new calls will be initiated.

400.description: Campaign is not active and cannot be paused

post.description: Resume a paused campaign to continue making calls.

400.description: Campaign is not paused and cannot be resumed

get.description: Get pending callbacks for a campaign -- contacts who need to be called back.
Returns a paginated list of call records with optional filtering by agent, campaign, direction, status, sentiment, and date range.

post.description: Initiate an outbound call to a phone number using a specified agent. The call is placed immediately.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific call including transcript, recording URL, analysis, sentiment, cost, and summary.

post.description: Terminate an active call. The call will be ended gracefully.

get.description: Get a temporary signed URL for the call recording. URLs expire after 1 hour.
Get the full transcript for a completed call including speaker labels, timestamps, and AI-generated summary.

post.description: Generate a token for initiating web-based calls through the SmartAlex widget or custom WebSocket integration.

websocket_url.description: WebSocket URL for connecting the call

get.description: Returns all deals in your pipeline, ordered by creation date (newest first). Optionally filter by pipeline stage.

post.description: Create a new deal in your sales pipeline.

get.description: Retrieve full details for a specific deal including history and associated activities.

patch.description: Update a deal's stage, value, or other details. Only included fields will be updated.

delete.description: Permanently delete a deal from your pipeline. This action cannot be undone.

get.description: Returns all configured webhook endpoints for your account.

post.description: Create a new webhook endpoint to receive real-time event notifications. A signing secret is automatically generated and returned in the response (shown only once). The endpoint URL must use HTTPS.

201.description: Webhook created. The `secret` field is shown only once -- store it securely for signature verification.

delete.description: Remove a webhook endpoint. Events will no longer be delivered to this URL.

post.description: Send a sample event payload to your webhook endpoint for testing. No actual event is created.

status_code.description: HTTP status code returned by your endpoint

get.description: Get platform health, operational status, and account usage statistics.

post.description: Fired when a call ends, regardless of outcome.

call.summary: Customer scheduled appointment for next Tuesday.

200.description: Return a 200 status to acknowledge receipt

post.description: Fired when a campaign finishes processing all contacts.

200.description: Return a 200 status to acknowledge receipt

post.description: Fired when a new contact is added to the database.

200.description: Return a 200 status to acknowledge receipt

post.description: Fired when a deal moves to a new pipeline stage.

200.description: Return a 200 status to acknowledge receipt

is_active.description: Whether the agent is active and can take calls

knowledge_base.description: Additional context and knowledge for the agent

tools.description: Tools available to the agent (e.g., transfer_call, book_meeting, send_sms)

phone_numbers.description: Phone numbers assigned to this agent

skip_duplicates.description: Skip contacts with duplicate phone numbers

update_existing.description: Update existing contacts instead of skipping

agent_id.description: ID of the agent assigned to this campaign

contacts_voicemail.description: Number of calls that went to voicemail

connect_rate.description: Fraction of calls that connected (0.0 to 1.0)

agent_id.description: Agent ID to assign to the campaign

contacts.description: Array of contacts to add to the campaign

reason.description: Reason for callback (e.g., no_answer, busy, callback_requested)

campaign_id.description: Campaign the call belongs to (null for non-campaign calls)

phone_number.description: Phone number of the external party

recording_url.description: URL to the call recording (temporary, expires after 1 hour)

phone_number.description: Number to call in E.164 format (e.g., +15551234567)

metadata.description: Custom data to attach to the call

agent_id.description: Agent to handle the web call

deal_value.description: Deal value in the account's currency

event_types.description: Event types this webhook subscribes to

secret.description: HMAC signing secret for payload verification. Shown only once at creation time -- store it securely.

WebhookEvent.description: Webhook event payload delivered to your endpoint

BadRequest.description: Invalid request. Check the error message for details on which fields are invalid.

example.error: first_name: String must contain at least 1 character(s)

Unauthorized.description: Missing or invalid API key. Ensure your Authorization header uses `Bearer sa_live_...` format.

example.error: Missing or invalid API key. Use: Authorization: Bearer sa_live_xxx

Forbidden.description: API key does not have the required permission for this operation. Write operations require the `write` permission.

example.error: API key does not have write permission

NotFound.description: The requested resource was not found.

RateLimited.description: Rate limit exceeded. Check `X-RateLimit-Reset` header for when to retry. Limits vary by plan: Professional (60/min), Dental (300/min), Real Estate (600/min).

example.error: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after 60 seconds.

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp when the window resets

InternalError.description: Internal server error. If this persists, contact support@getsmartalex.com.

bearerAuth.description: API key authentication. Generate keys from Settings > API in the SmartAlex dashboard. Keys use the `sa_live_` prefix.
